tasks.label: Kill PDB lockers and clean x64 obj
tasks.command: Get-Process mspdbsrv,cl,link,msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'win32\_Intermediate\snes9x\Release Unicode\x64\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'CLEAN_DONE'

tasks.label: Check exe timestamp after clean build
Clean then build no-PDB release
tasks.command: Get-Process mspdbsrv,cl,link,msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'win32\_Intermediate\snes9x\Release Unicode\x64\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & (Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\amd64\MSBuild.exe') 'win32\snes9xw.vcxproj' /t:Build /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /p:BuildInParallel=false /p:CL_MPCount=1 /v:minimal /nologo

tasks.label: Fresh Build To File
tasks.command: $msbuild = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\amd64\MSBuild.exe'; Remove-Item 'win32\fresh_build.log' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $msbuild 'win32\snes9xw.vcxproj' /t:Build /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /p:BuildInParallel=false /p:CL_MPCount=1 /v:minimal /nologo *> 'win32\fresh_build.log'; Write-Output "EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: Fresh Build After Header Fix
tasks.command: $msbuild = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\amd64\MSBuild.exe'; Get-Process mspdbsrv,cl,link,msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'win32\fresh_build_after_header_fix.log' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $msbuild 'win32\snes9xw.vcxproj' /t:Build /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /p:BuildInParallel=false /p:CL_MPCount=1 /v:minimal /nologo *> 'win32\fresh_build_after_header_fix.log'; Write-Output "EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: Fresh Build After Extern Cleanup
tasks.command: $msbuild = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\amd64\MSBuild.exe'; Get-Process mspdbsrv,cl,link,msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'win32\fresh_build_after_extern_cleanup.log' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $msbuild 'win32\snes9xw.vcxproj' /t:Build /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /p:BuildInParallel=false /p:CL_MPCount=1 /v:minimal /nologo *> 'win32\fresh_build_after_extern_cleanup.log'; Write-Output "EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: Rebuild deps with v145
tasks.command: $msbuild = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\amd64\MSBuild.exe'; Remove-Item 'win32\dep_rebuild.log' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $msbuild 'win32\zlib\zlib.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; & $msbuild 'win32\libpng\libpng.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release Unicode' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *>> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; & $msbuild 'win32\glslang\glslang\glslang.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *>> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; & $msbuild 'win32\glslang\SPIRV\SPIRV.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *>> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; & $msbuild 'win32\glslang\hlsl\HLSL.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *>> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; & $msbuild 'win32\glslang\glslang\OSDependent\Windows\OSDependent.vcxproj' /t:Rebuild /p:Configuration='Release' /p:Platform='x64' /p:PlatformToolset=v145 /m:1 /v:minimal /nologo *>> 'win32\dep_rebuild.log'; Write-Output "EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE"
